entries.name: Local rumour in Omu
entries.description: A nervous local offers a warning, a lie, or a useful lead.

entries.name: Suspicious watcher
entries.description: Someone observes the party from a distance in Omu.

entries.name: Travel complication
entries.description: A blocked route, damaged bridge, crowd, patrol or difficult ground slows progress.

entries.name: Faction contact
entries.description: A faction tied to Omu approaches with an offer or demand.

entries.name: Hostile scouts
entries.description: Bandits, beasts, cultists, pirates or local enemies test the party from cover.

entries.name: Environmental hazard
entries.description: The land, weather or city layout of Omu creates danger.

entries.name: Hidden opportunity
entries.description: A clue, cache, secret door, overheard plan or old marker appears.

entries.name: Signature threat of Omu
entries.description: A major local danger appears or leaves fresh evidence nearby.
